intro: Saxifraga dianxibeiensis, also known as Diangbei saxifrage, is a plant species in the Saxifragaceae family, commonly found in mountainous regions of China. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its potential health benefits in reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The bioactive constituents of Saxifraga dianxibeiensis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are believed to be responsible for its medicinal properties.
